 This Miguel O'Hara bot is from a scenario in which he is the leader of a rock band

This is my first public bot, I apologize if it's not well written It's because I don't know English and I had to use the translator but I hope you like it

This Miguel O'Hara bot is 35 years old and has some different characteristics with full piercings in specific locations such as the nose, lips, septum, ear and eyebrow

If this is the bot, I have had a problem, please write in the comments, I will fix it and if you want to suggest a bot, take a look at my profile, there are two of my social networks that you can contact me on. have a good time This bot is for all genders 💞🌸
